title: Russia burns gas into the atmosphere while cutting supplies to EU | Reuters
description: Russia is wasting large volumes of natural gas by burning it in a huge orange flare near the Finnish border at a time when it has sharply cut deliveries to the European Union, scientists and analysts said on Friday.
bodyText: Reporting by Ilze Filks and Vladimir Soldatkin; Editing by Mark Trevelyan and Hugh Lawson Our Standards: The Thomson Reuters Trust Principles., opens new tab
